title: What is the status of support for 3D arrays in Verilator nowadays?

features.name: 3D packed array declaration
features.description: Code should include a 3-dimensional packed array declaration with more than 2 packed dimensions

features.name: 2D unpacked array with packed element
features.description: Code should include a 2-dimensional unpacked array where element type is a packed array

features.name: readmem with 128-bit cell size
features.description: Code should include a $readmemb/$readmemh call operating on memory cells that are 128 bits wide
